span.p:
WIP-6 v1.0 scope
no DID · no staking contract · no GPU attestation

span.p:
sealHash
commit: header fields, VRF fields, ECCPoW params

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Per-nonce message
m_nu = H(VCT_MINE || sealHash || nu)

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ECCPoW seed
powSeed_nu = H(VCT_ECCPOW || sealHash || nu || sigma_nu)

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ECCPoW search
find valid codeword C

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Candidate block
(a_i, PK_i, pi_i, nu, sigma_nu, C)

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Verifier checks
1. Balance(h-l, a_i) >= S0
2. Addr(PK_i) = a_i
3. ECVRF.Verify(PK_i, alpha, pi_i)
4. Verify_PK_i(m_nu, sigma_nu)
5. ECCPoW.Verify(powSeed_nu, C)
